scores.correctness_notes: Covers lifecycle, relation, storage, secret, pebble, and series upgrade hooks correctly, but notably omits action events (<name>_action), collect_app_status, and collect_unit_status — which are all in the gold standard.
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor inaccuracy: describes 'start' as 'Fired after install to start the workload' when it is actually fired after the first config-changed event. Not a fabricated API but a factual error. No invented event names or classes.
